Purpose: Hero image for 'GenAI Didn't Kill Rigor — It Moved It'

Character.Description: A highly competent, focused woman coder and systems thinker

Face.Expression: Resolved, clear-eyed, looking forward with quiet determination
Face.Makeup: Bold, pinks or purples, with a touch of shimmer

Base.Name: Dark blazer
Base.Description: Professional dark blazer over tech-casual attire, sleeves pushed up
Base.Context: Always present, bridges corporate and technical worlds

Situational.Name: Professional glasses
Situational.Description: Modern rectangular frames, subtle tech integration
Situational.Context: Pushed up onto forehead, transitioning from old work to new

Style.Rendering: High-detail digital painting, photorealistic, concept art quality

Lighting.Type: Dramatic transition lighting — cool blue on the left fading to warm amber on the right
Lighting.Shadows: Sharp, emphasizing the boundary between old and new

ColorPalette.Treatment: High saturation, strong contrast between warm neons and cool tech light

Atmosphere.Mood: Transitional — leaving something behind, moving toward clarity

Situation.Name: The Migration of Rigor
Situation.Setting: She stands at a threshold between two spaces. Behind her (left), a cluttered coordination war room — holographic Kanban boards, floating ticket stubs, tangled dependency threads, stacked PRDs glowing faintly. Ahead of her (right), a clean, luminous workspace with a single focused holographic display showing a crisp behavioral specification — clean structured text, clear and readable.
Situation.Camera: Mid-shot, wide angle, subject at the threshold between the two spaces, body angled toward the clean side

CharacterPose.Expression: Resolved, clear-eyed, looking toward the clean workspace with quiet determination — not smiling, not frowning, just ready
CharacterPose.BodyPosition: Standing at the boundary, weight shifting forward toward the specification side
CharacterPose.Gesture: One hand resting on the doorframe of the threshold, the other relaxed at her side

Character.Name: Dark blazer
Character.Description: Sleeves pushed up, professional but ready for work

Character.Name: Professional glasses
Character.Description: Modern frames pushed up on forehead
Character.Application: Transitional gesture — done reading the old, ready to see the new

Article.Name: Holographic Kanban boards
Article.Description: Semi-transparent boards crowded with cards, swim lanes, dependency arrows — visually dense and tangled
Article.Application: Behind her, filling the left side of the frame, slightly dim and fading
Article.SymbolicMeaning: The coordination machinery that used to be necessary

Article.Name: Floating ticket stubs
Article.Description: Small translucent cards drifting in the air like leaves, some with APPROVED stamps
Article.Application: Scattered in the air behind her, some falling to the ground

Article.Name: Behavioral specification display
Article.Description: A single clean holographic panel showing structured text — clear headings, acceptance criteria, clean formatting
Article.Application: Ahead of her on the right, glowing with warm amber light, readable and focused
Article.SymbolicMeaning: The new rigor — specification, context, evaluation

Environment.Name: Threshold / doorframe
Environment.Description: An architectural boundary between the two spaces — could be industrial cyberpunk framing
Environment.Application: Center of frame, she stands in it

Environment.Name: Cluttered war room
Environment.Description: Left side — dense, layered, holographic clutter of coordination artifacts
Environment.Application: Background left, cool blue lighting, slightly chaotic

Environment.Name: Clean workspace
Environment.Description: Right side — minimal, focused, a single workstation with the specification display
Environment.Application: Background right, warm amber lighting, calm and clear

KeyDetails: The visual story is a migration — she is physically crossing from coordination clutter to specification clarity
The lighting transition from cool-chaotic (left) to warm-focused (right) reinforces the thesis
The Kanban boards and tickets behind her are not destroyed — they're just fading, becoming irrelevant
The specification ahead is not a wall of text — it's clean, structured, readable, inviting
Situation.LightingFocus: Cool blue neon on the left (old coordination world), warm amber on the right (new specification world), rim light catching her silver hair at the boundary

ArticleContext.Title: GenAI Didn't Kill Rigor — It Moved It
Themes: rigor migrating from coordination to specification
new skills in specification context and evaluation
